summary: Comprehensive testing of Unified Appointments System. All features from requirements verified working: Mom's My Team page shows Message/Schedule quick actions, Schedule button navigates to appointments with provider pre-selected, Mom's appointments page correctly shows Mom layout (not Provider layout - previous bug FIXED), Provider dashboard shows correct appointment count, appointments visible to both Mom and Provider. Backend tests: 17/17 passed. Frontend tests: All critical flows working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified appointments system fully tested and working. Mom's My Team page has Schedule/Message quick actions. Clicking Schedule navigates to /appointments?providerId=X&providerName=Y and auto-opens create modal with provider pre-selected. Provider dashboard shows correct appointment count (1 Upcoming Appts). Appointments created by provider appear on Mom's side (cross-visibility working).

verified_features.mom_my_team_quick_actions: PASS - Message and Schedule buttons visible below team member card
verified_features.mom_appointments_page_layout: PASS - Shows 'My Appointments' title with correct Mom layout (previous bug FIXED)
verified_features.provider_pre_selection: PASS - Create appointment modal opens automatically with provider selected
verified_features.provider_dashboard_stats: PASS - Shows 1 Active Client, 1 Upcoming Appts, Quick Actions
verified_features.provider_appointments_list: PASS - Shows 'Awaiting Response (1)' with client name, date, time, status
verified_features.cross_visibility: PASS - Appointment created by Doula visible to Mom (tested with Emma Johnson)
verified_features.unified_appointments_api: PASS - /api/appointments returns correct data for both Mom and Provider roles
verified_features.bottom_nav_correct: PASS - Mom sees 'My Team', Provider sees 'Clients'
